title: Vol.7 Static UI Shell Boundary Map
description: Validates the static, read-only UI shell boundary map fixture for Vol.7 Phase 7.0.

phase.description: Phase label for the static UI shell boundary map.

baseline_commit.description: Repository commit used as the baseline for this static boundary map.

origin_status.description: Remote synchronization status at boundary-map creation time.

working_tree_status.description: Working tree status at boundary-map baseline time.

active_checkpoint.description: Active LDD checkpoint consumed as read-only fixture metadata.

latest_timeline_event.description: Latest timeline event from the Vol.6 handoff baseline.

runtime_records_count.description: Runtime record count at the Vol.6 handoff baseline.

timeline_event_count.description: Timeline event count at the Vol.6 handoff baseline.

timeline_warning_count.description: Timeline warning count at the Vol.6 handoff baseline.

active_rules_count.description: Active rule count at the Vol.6 handoff baseline.

operating_mode.description: Operating mode from the active checkpoint.

portfolio_mode.description: Portfolio mode from the active checkpoint.

allowed_panels.description: Read-only panels a future static UI shell may display.

forbidden_actions.description: UI actions that must remain disabled or absent.

forbidden_integrations.description: System integrations forbidden for the static shell boundary.

fixture_only.description: The boundary map is a static fixture only.

read_only.description: The boundary map can only be read.

mutation_allowed.description: Runtime or fixture mutation is not allowed.

credential_handling_allowed.description: Credential collection, storage, or handling is not allowed.

live_data_allowed.description: Live market, broker, Binance, or external data is not allowed.

ldd_scope_reminder.description: Reminder that LDD scans the whole U.S. equity market, not only current or former holdings.
